revision.description: Updated CardsGrid dark mode padding to match DynamicContentCarousel
changes: Container padding: py-10 md:py-15 → py-18 md:py-23
revision.reason: Align with DynamicContentCarousel dark mode pattern for consistency

tsxPhpSync.details: Both CardsGrid.tsx (line 114) and CardsGrid.php (line 36) now use identical dark mode padding: 'py-18 md:py-23' on container and 'before:inset-y-0' on pseudo-element. TSX and PHP are perfectly in sync.
tsxPhpSync.phpPattern: relative py-18 md:py-23 before:absolute before:bg-charcoal before:rounded-3xl before:-z-1 before:-inset-x-(--side-gutter) before:inset-y-0 md:before:-inset-x-8
tsxPhpSync.tsxPattern: relative py-18 md:py-23 before:absolute before:bg-charcoal before:rounded-3xl before:-z-1 before:-inset-x-(--side-gutter) before:inset-y-0 md:before:-inset-x-8

consistencyWithDynamicContentCarousel.details: CardsGrid dark mode pattern now matches DynamicContentCarousel exactly. DynamicContentCarousel.php line 95 uses the same pattern: 'py-18 md:py-23' and 'before:inset-y-0'. Consistency achieved across carousel blocks.

build.details: Build completes successfully with no TypeScript errors. Asset size warnings are pre-existing and unrelated to the padding revision.

rendering.details: All 13 block instances on test page render correctly with the updated padding. Block count verified: 13 takt/cards-grid blocks, all properly nested in DemoContainer wrappers. Screenshot captured showing dark mode sections rendering with increased padding.

screenshots.purpose: Verify dark mode sections render correctly with increased padding (py-18 md:py-23) and no vertical pseudo-element insets (before:inset-y-0)
